focus: Gate-by-gate Hallmark audit and anti-slop coverage diff against sk-design audit and shared polish contracts
noveltyJustification: Six of eight findings were fully new gate-level or file-level conclusions and two refined overlap from iteration 1, yielding 0.875 rounded to 0.88.
keyQuestions: Which Hallmark audit gates and pre-emit critique heuristics are absent or weaker in sk-design's audit and polish contracts?
answeredQuestions: Which Hallmark audit gates and pre-emit critique heuristics are absent or weaker in sk-design's audit and polish contracts?
ruledOut: Replacing sk-design P0-P3 severity with Hallmark critical/major/minor
Adding Hallmark CSS stamps or project logs to read-only audit
Promoting context-sensitive numeric style rules to universal blockers

summary: Reuse Hallmark as a selective presentation-probe source; preserve sk-design's evidence-first exceptions, P0-P3 severity, and five-dimension audit instead of importing a 58/58 blocker.
Highest-value missing named probes are invented metrics, re-drawn chrome, AI nav/footer, hanging section heads, compound hover effects, and focus-ring animation.
Add an evidence-labeled polish preflight for intent, hierarchy, execution, brief specificity, restraint, and structural distance; skip source stamps and uncalibrated 1-5 scoring.
Do not copy Hallmark critical/major/minor labels; map derived tells into sk-design Anti-Patterns and assign P0-P3 from user impact and evidence.

sk-design is stronger on keyboard, screen reader, zoom/reflow, assistive-tech, measured performance, evidence coverage, and user-impact severity; Hallmark presentation probes complement rather than replace it.
Adopt responsive failure outcomes as static-risk/rendered probes but skip universal overflow clipping, fixed hero-padding ratios, chroma bans, and font-count ceilings.
Put named tells in ai-fingerprint-tells plus registry/self-defect/fixtures, behavior and responsive risks in audit references, and the compact preflight in shared polish orchestration.
Hallmark CSS stamps and project logs do not belong in sk-design's read-only audit workflow; evidence records and source attestations already own provenance.
